$comment: Canonical scripts to merge into each sub-repo's package.json. Drop-in keys: check:size, check:debt, check:dups, check:deps, check:agents, check:coverage, check:ci-parity, check:all (quiet runner), verify, test:ci, prepare. Conditional gates (check:bundle-size, gen:docs:check, gen:openapi:check) are picked up by the runner automatically when defined. See docs/check-all-standard.md at the os-eco root and the toolkit README §(d) Step 8 'package.json wiring'.

notes.check:all: The byte-identical quiet runner (scripts/check-all.ts) — one aligned line per gate, signatures-only on failure, CHECK_ALL_VERBOSE=1 / --bail escape hatches. It resolves the gate manifest from package.json and exports it as GATES; never replace it with an && chain.
notes.verify: Agent-facing alias for check:all. Mandatory in every conforming repo.
notes.check:ci-parity: Final gate in the manifest. Imports GATES from check-all.ts and fails on any CI `bun run <x>` not reachable from it. Per-repo aliases/ciOnly go in scripts/ci-parity-config.json.
notes.check:dups: Runs jscpd via bunx; no devDep needed. Config lives in .jscpd.json at the sub-repo root (copied from templates/l5-toolkit/configs/.jscpd.json).
notes.check:coverage: Wraps `bun test --coverage` and enforces the floors in scripts/coverage-budgets.json. Runs second-to-last in the manifest (most expensive gate before the parity meta-gate).
notes.test:ci: Emits both coverage/lcov.info and test-results/junit.xml so report-test-timing.ts and report-quality-metrics.ts can render their CI step-summary panels. Alias it to check:coverage in scripts/ci-parity-config.json.
notes.prepare: Idempotent: skips on a non-git checkout (e.g. inside a Docker build context). After install, runs `git config core.hooksPath scripts/hooks`, which makes scripts/hooks/pre-commit fire on `git commit`.
notes.devDependencies: knip is required for check:deps; yaml is required by check-ci-parity.ts. jscpd runs through `bunx` (no install). Sub-repos that need a structured logger (plot, mulch, seeds) additionally add pino + pino-pretty per AGENTS.md.
